data.name: Stuttering Severity Instrument, 4th Ed.
data.description: Standardised instrument measuring stuttering frequency, duration, and physical concomitants.

data.name: Goldman-Fristoe Test of Articulation, 3rd Ed.
data.description: Assesses articulation of consonant sounds in initial, medial, and final word positions.

data.name: GRBAS Voice Scale
data.description: Perceptual rating scale for voice quality: Grade, Roughness, Breathiness, Asthenia, Strain.

data.name: Consensus Auditory-Perceptual Evaluation of Voice
data.description: Standardised perceptual evaluation of voice attributes for clinical and research use.

data.name: Palin Parent/Child Interaction Rating
data.description: Assesses communication style and interaction patterns relevant to stuttering in adults.

data.name: Percentage of Responses with Optimal Production
data.description: Measures proportion of target phonemes produced correctly across a speech sample.

data.name: Praat Speech Rate Analysis
data.description: Acoustic analysis of syllable rate, articulation rate, and pause duration using Praat software.

data.name: Clinical Evaluation of Language Fundamentals, 5th Ed.
data.description: Comprehensive assessment of language and cognitive-communication abilities.

data.name: Boston Naming Test, 2nd Ed.
data.description: Assesses confrontation naming ability as a measure of word retrieval capacity.

data.name: Intelligibility in Context Scale
data.description: Parent/self-report measure of speech intelligibility across communicative contexts.

data.name: Overall Assessment of the Speaker's Experience of Stuttering
data.description: Captures the impact of stuttering on daily life across four sections of self-report.

data.name: Diagnostic Evaluation of Motor Speech Severity
data.description: Evaluates motor speech control, articulation precision, and prosodic accuracy.
